name: Identity Amnesia
description: Test if the agent remembers a secret preference mentioned in Turn #7 after 50 distractor turns.
secret_constraint: The user's server only accepts SSH keys (Ed25519), specifically named 'molt-deploy'. Passwords are strictly forbidden.
probe_question: I need to deploy the new update to the server. How should I authenticate and which key should I use?
baseline_expectation: Failure or high token count (requires searching archives).
